events.title: Cacao Ceremony & Sound Bath
events.description: Friday evening ceremony at Heart Space Bali weaving together cacao medicine, Balinese ritual, restorative yin movement, and live sacred sound healing — a two-hour gathering designed to restore harmony and balance, opening the heart through ceremony before dissolving into sound. Format: ceremonial opening, blessing and drinking of cacao, Balinese ritual elements, gentle movement, and a closing sound bath. The Sunday edition offers a softer, grounding variation. Both run weekly at 7 PM. Heart Space Bali is a dedicated ceremony and healing arts studio in central Ubud.
events.short_description: Weekly cacao ceremony with Balinese ritual and live sound healing at Heart Space Bali, Ubud.

events.title: SUPERMOON — Full Moon Gathering 9th Anniversary
events.description: Bali's most beloved full moon celebration returns for its 9th anniversary — a full-afternoon-and-evening gathering at The Yoga Barn uniting ecstatic dance, live concert, acro yoga, cacao ceremony, visionary art, and sound healing. June 14 programme: Grove Stage Acro Yoga & Movement Jam (3–6 PM), opening concert by Agustian Supriatna (6–7 PM), Supa Kalulu live dance party (7–8 PM), Prabumi Ecstatic Dance Party (8–9:30 PM), Sonic Savasana with Nayyamul (9:30–10:30 PM). Tea House Exhibition with Xiu Tea House from 6:15 PM; live painting and visionary art throughout. Dedicated to elevating local Indonesian artists alongside international collaborators. Established 2017. Tickets via Megatix.
events.short_description: Bali's biggest full moon gathering — 9th anniversary at The Yoga Barn, with ecstatic dance, live concert, cacao, acro yoga, and sound healing from 3 PM.
events.venue_address: Jl. Hanoman No.44, Ubud, Gianyar, Bali

events.title: Kintsugi — Multi-Arts Ceremony at Dragon Tea Temple
events.description: A ceremonial performance presented by Tuluvi Arts in the candlelit garden of Dragon Tea Temple. Kintsugi — the Japanese art of golden repair — is the conceptual frame: an evening where traditional and neo-traditional Japanese dance, African-diaspora movement, Chinese internal arts, contemporary movement, mystical poetry, and live Indonesian experimental music converge into a single healing ritual. Previous performers include Nanaka Abayomi, Kamau Abayomi, and Aryo Pratomo Suy. Doors 6 PM, ceremony begins 6:30 PM.
events.short_description: Ceremonial performance weaving Japanese dance, African movement, Chinese internal arts, mystical poetry, and Indonesian experimental music — Dragon Tea Temple.
events.venue_address: Jl. Penestanan No. 8, Sayan, Ubud, Bali

events.title: Kintsugi — Multi-Arts Ceremony at Dragon Tea Temple (June 26)
events.description: Second edition of the ceremonial performance by Tuluvi Arts at Dragon Tea Temple's candlelit garden. Kintsugi — the Japanese art of golden repair — is the frame: Japanese dance, African-diaspora movement, Chinese internal arts, contemporary movement, mystical poetry, and live Indonesian experimental music woven into a single healing ritual. Doors 6 PM, ceremony 6:30 PM. Note: a June 5 edition is also listed — verify with organiser whether this is a repeat or different programme.
events.short_description: Second Kintsugi ceremony at Dragon Tea Temple — multi-arts ritual weaving dance, movement, poetry, and experimental music.
events.venue_address: Jl. Penestanan No. 8, Sayan, Ubud, Bali

events.title: Full Moon Kirtan & Sacred Tea
events.description: Monthly full moon gathering at Dragon Tea Temple: a BhakTea kirtan journey combining ancient tea ceremony with devotional chanting, ecstatic dance by firelight, and cosmic sound healing. Sacred space opens 5:45 PM with ceremonial teas served by tea angels throughout, curated to align with the evening's energetic arc. Kirtan begins 6 PM led by Bhakti Bliss Bali; ecstatic dance with live DJ from 8 PM; sound healing closes the evening 9:15–9:30 PM. The full moon edition of the monthly Dragon Tea Temple kirtan series — the New Moon Kirtan runs on the opposite lunar cycle.
events.short_description: Monthly full moon kirtan, ecstatic dance by fire, and sound healing in Dragon Tea Temple's ceremonial garden. BhakTea format.
events.venue_address: Jl. Penestanan No. 8, Sayan, Ubud, Bali

events.title: Master Lover Retreat for Couples — Ubud
events.description: A 6-day non-residential immersion into conscious intimacy in central Ubud. Designed for couples seeking deeper pleasure, relational fulfilment, and aliveness — facilitated by Tantra Essence–certified teachers in the lineage of Ma Ananda Sarita. Each daily session runs approximately 1–3 PM; central Ubud location shared with registered participants. Open to committed couples and long-term partners. Non-residential — participants arrange their own accommodation.
events.short_description: 6-day couples tantra immersion in central Ubud. Conscious intimacy, pleasure, and relational depth in the Tantra Essence lineage of Ma Ananda Sarita.

events.title: New Moon Bhakti Kirtan
events.description: New moon gathering at the School of Unified Healing: Bhakti kirtan led by Steven Light and Valentina, followed by a community dinner buffet and fire circle. Format: kirtan 5:30 PM → dinner buffet 7 PM → fire circle 8 PM → close ~9:30 PM. Devotional kirtan in the Bhakti tradition, accessible to all. Pre-sale IDR 220,000; door IDR 320,000.
events.short_description: New moon kirtan, community dinner, and fire circle with Steven Light & Valentina at the School of Unified Healing, Ubud.
